prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-STYLING-HEAD-RAPUNZEL-HPNR2 Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Disney Existing Title: Disney Princess Rapunzel Styling Head Description: The Disney Princess Rapunzel styling head holds endless hair play possibilities. Rapunzel features her iconic, long blonde hair that is perfect for brushing and styling. This adventurous princess comes with 13 fun, wear and share accessories: 1 flower hair tie, 1 hair brush, 2 crown hair clips, 2 Pascal hair clips, 3 hair spirals, and 4 elastic bands. Kids can use Rapunzel's brush to brush her hair and create lots of fun hair styles. your little one will love using the adorable hair clips to pin and decorate Rapunzel's shiny, flowing locks. Kids can even use the hair clips in their own hair for even more fashion fun. ages 3+.

Please Note: All merchandise listed for sale is officially licensed, 100% authentic for worldwide distribution Search Terms: (none) Features: - The Disney Princess Rapunzel styling head holds endless hair play possibilities! Rapunzel features her iconic, long blonde hair that is perfect for brushing and styling. - Disney Princess Rapunzel styling head comes with long blonde hair and 13 styling accessories - Set includes: 1 flower hair tie, 1 hair brush, 2 crown hair clips, 2 Pascal hair clips, 3 hair spirals, and 4 elastic bands - Kids can use the brush to create fun hair styles on Rapunzel! - Kids can use the hair clips in their own hair as well as Rapunzel's === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Princess Rapunzel Styling Head with 13 Accessories

anthropic.title_differentiation: Long Blonde Hair, 13 Styling Accessories, Hair Brush, Crown Clips, Pascal Clips, Hair Spirals, Elastic Bands

openai.title_differentiation: 13 Styling Accessories, Long Brushable Blonde Hair, Brush, Crown And Pascal Clips, Spirals, Elastic Bands
